source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Intrepid Sword
abilities.effect: Boosts Attack in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Intrepid Sword
abilities.effect: Boosts Attack in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Dauntless Shield
abilities.effect: Boosts Defense in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Dauntless Shield
abilities.effect: Boosts Defense in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Immunity
abilities.effect: Prevents poison.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's immune system prevents it from being poisoned.

abilities.name: Toxic Boost
abilities.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× when poisoned.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up physical moves when the Pokémon is poisoned.

abilities.name: Pressure
abilities.effect: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.
abilities.flavor_text: Puts other Pokémon under pressure, causing them to expend more PP to use their moves.

abilities.name: Static
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is charged with static electricity and may paralyze attackers that make direct contact with it.

abilities.name: Defiant
abilities.effect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon has any stat lowered by an opposing Pokémon, its Attack stat will be boosted sharply.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.effect: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Prevents status conditions in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.effect: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Prevents status conditions in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Lightning Rod
abilities.effect: Redirects single-target Electric moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon draws in all Electric-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted.

abilities.name: Motor Drive
abilities.effect: Absorbs Electric moves, raising Speed one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Electric-type moves. Instead, its Speed stat is boosted.

abilities.name: Sap Sipper
abilities.effect: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Grass-type moves. Instead, its Attack stat is boosted.

abilities.name: Teravolt
abilities.effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

abilities.name: Volt Absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Pickup
abilities.effect: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items.  May also pick up an item after battle.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon may pick up an item another Pokémon used during a battle. It may pick up items outside of battle, too.

abilities.name: Gluttony
abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.effect: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

abilities.name: Illusion
abilities.effect: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokémon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its Trainer's party.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.effect: Prevents flinching.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Infiltrator
abilities.effect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.

abilities.name: Hustle
abilities.effect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but lowers its accuracy.

abilities.name: Aura Break
abilities.effect: Makes Dark Aura and Fairy Aura weaken moves of their respective types.
abilities.flavor_text: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed to lower the power of affected moves.

abilities.name: Power Construct
abilities.effect: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.
abilities.flavor_text: Other Cells gather to aid when its HP becomes half or less. Then the Pokémon changes its form to Complete Forme.
